body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-2587", "cvss": {"score": 9.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-917", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an Expression Language Statement ('Expression Language Injection')"}], "description": "A critical Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability was identified in the server-side template rendering mechanism used by the Glassfish gadget handler. The application processes .xml files and evaluates user-supplied values within a context where Expression Language (EL) “expressions” are processed without proper sanitization or escaping. By injecting expressions such as #{7*7}, the server returns 49, confirming server-side EL evaluation. This issue allows a remote attacker to fully compromise the underlying host, enabling capabilities as reading/modifying data, executing arbitrary commands, persistence, and lateral movement.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00628, "percentile": 0.45505}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-29wv-cv7p-xjc2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-04T19:21:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-29wv-cv7p-xjc2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-29wv-cv7p-xjc2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-2587"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-19T15:16:28Z", "published_at": "2026-05-19T15:31:35Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2587", "https://gitlab.eclipse.org/security/cve-assignment/-/issues/86", "https://github.com/eclipse-ee4j/glassfish/releases/tag/8.0.2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-29wv-cv7p-xjc2"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/eclipse-ee4j/glassfish", "summary": "GlassFish's gadget handler is vulnerable to RCE", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-04T19:21:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-29wv-cv7p-xjc2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "8.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.glassfish.main.admingui:admingui"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 8.0.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.glassfish.jsftemplating:jsftemplating"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: GlassFish's gadget handler is vulnerable to RCE
